## Nintendo Direct June 2026 — Research Report

### Key Limitation
**All web search and web fetch tools are currently unavailable**, so I cannot access real-time sources to verify whether Nintendo has made any official announcements about a June 2026 Nintendo Direct as of today (June 4, 2026). The findings below are based on historical patterns and my knowledge cutoff, and may be incomplete or outdated.

### What Is Known (Based on Historical Patterns)

- **Nintendo traditionally holds a major "Nintendo Direct" presentation in June**, often timed around E3 or its successor events (typically the second or third week of June).
- **Nintendo Directs are typically announced only 1–3 days before they air**, making it common for a June Direct to not yet be officially confirmed even in the first week of June.
- **Nintendo Switch 2** launched in June 2025, so a June 2026 Direct would likely focus on the Switch 2 software lineup heading into the holiday season.
- Nintendo's official channels for announcements include:
  - **Twitter/X**: [@NintendoAmerica](https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica), [@Nintendo](https://twitter.com/Nintendo)
  - **Website**: [nintendo.com/direct](https://www.nintendo.com/us/nintendo-direct/)

- Whether any **Partner Direct, Indie World, or general Direct** has been confirmed for June 2026.

### Recommendation

1. Nintendo's official social media accounts (especially @NintendoAmerica on X/Twitter)
